narrative:
Polk Township has 1,458 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
